source_pr.title: dxf: fix task cannot be cancelled when the number of active scheduler reached the limit
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve? Issue Number: close #63896, ref #61702 Problem Summary: ### What changed and how does it work? also query tasks that doesn't need resources to run when the active schedulers reach limit ### Check List Tests - [x] Unit test - [ ] Integration test - [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
apply this diff, so only 1 job can be run at the same time and it will wait 30s before run

```diff diff --git a/pkg/disttask/framework/proto/task.go b/pkg/disttask/framework/proto/task.go index 0ca1162f22..6fe16bd023 100644 --- a/pkg/disttask/framework/proto/task.go +++ b/pkg/disttask/framework/proto/task.go @@ -65,7 +65,7 @@ const ( // MaxConcurrentTask is the max concurrency of task. // TODO: remove this limit later. -var MaxConcurrentTask = 16 +var MaxConcurrentTask = 1 // ExtraParams is the extra params of task. // Note: only store params that's not used for filter or sort in this struct. diff --git a/pkg/disttask/importinto/encode_and_sort_operator.go b/pkg/disttask/importinto/encode_and_sort_operator.go index 03b18b156e..edf36c6542 100644 --- a/pkg/disttask/importinto/encode_and_sort_operator.go +++ b/pkg/disttask/importinto/encode_and_sort_operator.go @@ -100,6 +100,9 @@ func newEncodeAndSortOperator( } func (op *encodeAndSortOperator) Open() error { + op.logger.Info("#### wait for a while to let other operators be ready") + time.Sleep(30 * time.Second) + op.logger.Info("#### wait done") op.wg.Run(func() { for err := range op.errCh { if op.firstErr.CompareAndSwap(nil, err) { ```

then run below SQLs ```sql create table t1(sysid int);create table t2(sysid int);create table t3(sysid int); import into t1 from 's3://mybucket/a.csv?access-key=minioadmin&secret-access-key=minioadmin&endpoint=http%3a%2f%2f0.0.0.0%3a9000' with detached; import into t2 from 's3://mybucket/a.csv?access-key=minioadmin&secret-access-key=minioadmin&endpoint=http%3a%2f%2f0.0.0.0%3a9000' with detached; import into t3 from 's3://mybucket/a.csv?access-key=minioadmin&secret-access-key=minioadmin&endpoint=http%3a%2f%2f0.0.0.0%3a9000' with detached; ``` we can see only job 1 is running, others are pending ```sql mysql> show import jobs; +--------+-----------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------+----------+-----------+---------+------------------+---------------+----------------+----------------------------+----------------------------+----------+------------+---------------------+----------+-------------------------+---------------------+-----------------------+----------------+--------------+ | Job_ID | Group_Key | Data_Source | Target_Table | Table_ID | Phase | Status | Source_File_Size | Imported_Rows | Result_Message | Create_Time | Start_Time | End_Time | Created_By | Last_Update_Time | Cur_Step | Cur_Step_Processed_Size | Cur_Step_Total_Size | Cur_Step_Progress_Pct | Cur_Step_Speed | Cur_Step_ETA | +--------+-----------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------+----------+-----------+---------+------------------+---------------+----------------+----------------------------+----------------------------+----------+------------+---------------------+----------+-------------------------+---------------------+-----------------------+----------------+--------------+ | 1 | NULL | s3://mybucket/a.csv?access-key=xxxxxx&endpoint=http%3A%2F%2F0.0.0.0%3A9000&secret-access-key=xxxxxx | `test`.`t1` | 7 | importing | running | 12B | 0 | | 2025-10-10 21:25:55.268217 | 2025-10-10 21:25:55.794117 | NULL | root@% | 2025-10-10 21:26:05 | import | 0B | 0B | 0 | 0B/s | N/A | | 2 | NULL | s3://mybucket/a.csv?access-key=xxxxxx&endpoint=http%3A%2F%2F0.0.0.0%3A9000&secret-access-key=xxxxxx | `test`.`t2` | 9 | | pending | 12B | NULL | | 2025-10-10 21:25:55.302702 | NULL | NULL | root@% | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | | 3 | NULL | s3://mybucket/a.csv?access-key=xxxxxx&endpoint=http%3A%2F%2F0.0.0.0%3A9000&secret-access-key=xxxxxx | `test`.`t3` | 11 | | pending | 12B | NULL | | 2025-10-10 21:25:55.322353 | NULL | NULL | root@% | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | NULL | +--------+-----------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------+----------+-----------+---------+------------------+---------------+----------------+----------------------------+----------------------------+----------+------------+---------------------+----------+-------------------------+---------------------+-----------------------+----------------+--------------+ 3 rows in set (0.01 sec) ``` then we can cancel job 2 and 3. **without this PR, job 2 can only be cancelled after job 1 finishes** ``` mysql> cancel import job 3; Query OK, 0 rows affected (1.84 sec) mysql> cancel import job 2; Query OK, 0 rows affected (3.63 sec) ``` - [ ] No need to test > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed. > Side effects - [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU - [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory - [ ] Breaking backward compatibility Documentation - [ ] Affects user behaviors - [ ] Contains syntax changes - [ ] Contains variable changes - [ ] Contains experimental features - [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility ### Release note Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note. ```release-note None ```

fix_pattern: also query tasks that doesn't need resources to run when the active schedulers reach limit
analysis:
PR title: dxf: fix task cannot be cancelled when the number of active scheduler reached the limit
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/63897
Triage sources: manual_triage, determinism_stabilization
Triage summary: t.Cleanup(func() { (pkg/disttask/framework/scheduler/scheduler_manager_nokit_test.go)
Changed files (7): pkg/disttask/framework/mock/scheduler_mock.go, pkg/disttask/framework/scheduler/BUILD.bazel, pkg/disttask/framework/scheduler/interface.go, pkg/disttask/framework/scheduler/scheduler_manager.go, pkg/disttask/framework/scheduler/scheduler_manager_nokit_test.go, pkg/disttask/framework/storage/table_test.go, pkg/disttask/framework/storage/task_table.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
